column3: NovaLXP delivers AI‑powered personalization, adaptive learning journeys, and actionable insights that go far beyond the static course management of a traditional LMS.
Learners don’t just browse a static course catalog — NovaLXP intelligently recommends the next best skill based on completions, tags, and role needs, creating a Netflix‑style, binge‑worthy experience
Instead of one‑off modules, NovaLXP sequences content into dynamic pathways that adapt as learners progress, ensuring every journey feels relevant, immersive, and outcome‑driven.
Managers and stakeholders gain real‑time dashboards that show not just completions, but capability growth and impact, helping align learning directly with business goals.
How do I update my profile in NovaLXP?

After logging in, click on your name in the top‑right corner and select Profile. From there, you can add a photo, update your details, and adjust notification preferences so your learning experience feels more personal.
Where can I find my courses?
Once logged in, your Dashboard shows all the courses you’re enrolled in. You can also use the Search bar or the Course Catalogue to explore new learning opportunities recommended for you.
How do I submit assignments or activities?

Inside each course, you’ll see activities like assignments, quizzes, or forums. Click the activity, follow the instructions, and upload your work or complete the task online. NovaLXP will confirm your submission and track your progress automatically.
How do I track my progress?
Your Progress Bar and Completion Checkmarks show how far you’ve gone in each course. You can also view your Grades and Feedback under the “My Learning” section to see results and instructor comments.
Can I access NovaLXP on my phone or tablet?

Yes. NovaLXP is fully responsive, so you can log in through your browser on any device. Coming soon:  the NovaLXP mobile app (powered by Moodle’s app), which lets you download content for offline learning.
You can add up to 6 carousel items to promote your content or courses. Each carousel item can also include a YouTube video. It's a great way to grab your visitors' attention and spark their interest!
